battle of lexington and concord.name: Battle of Lexington and Concord

markers.description: Site of the first shots fired.

movements.description: British withdrawal back to Boston under heavy fire.

zones.description: Area of running skirmishes between Concord and Boston.

markers.description: The main defensive fortification built by Americans.

zones.description: Fortified American position.

markers.description: Location of the heaviest fighting.

zones.description: Defensive positions on high ground.

zones.description: Area occupied by Hessian troops.

markers.description: Site where Hugh Mercer was mortally wounded.

markers.description: Last British holdout in the town.
